name: Vowel Filter
description: This algorithm is based on the Dual Vowel Filter algorithm on the disting mk4. A set of three bandpass filters (BPFs) is used to mimic the response of the human vocal tract, resulting in vowel-like sounds when provided suitable source material.

parameters.name: Vowel (Switched)
parameters.description: The chosen vowel, if the mode is Switched.

parameters.name: Vowel (Blended)
parameters.description: The chosen vowel, if the mode is Blended.

parameters.name: BPF gain 2
parameters.description: Adjusts the gain of the second BPF.

parameters.name: BPF gain 3
parameters.description: Adjusts the gain of the third BPF.

parameters.name: Width
parameters.description: The number of busses to process, starting from the Input. For example, for a stereo signal, set this to 2.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: The first input bus to process.

input_ports.name: Vowel input
input_ports.description: The bus to use to control the vowel. Scaled such that 0-5V covers the full range of vowels.
